task_completion.description: Open the target post in the WordPress editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress editor is open, displaying the post title 'Annual Marketing Strategy Report'.
The WordPress Revisions screen is visible, showing a comparison of different versions of the post (typically with a timeline slider at the top and side-by-side text comparisons).

task_completion.description: Restore the revision containing the required Q2 Goals and Budget Allocation content
task_completion.visual_evidence: The post content (either in the editor or the live published page) explicitly contains the required strings: 'Southeast Asia', 'Eastern Europe', 'South America', and '$2.4 million'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the restored post does not contain draft notes or placeholders
task_completion.visual_evidence: The post content (either in the editor or the live published page) does NOT contain the strings 'DRAFT NOTES', 'placeholder', or 'TODO'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the restored post is published
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress editor shows the post status as 'Published' (e.g., the right sidebar indicates Published status, or an 'Update' button is visible instead of 'Publish'), or the live frontend view of the published post is shown.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to interact with WordPress
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the WordPress admin panel inside a web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like WP-CLI) to restore the revision.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine WordPress Revisions and Editor UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the standard WordPress interface, not a local text editor or a mocked text file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the WordPress UI using database tools
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal MySQL commands or phpMyAdmin to directly alter the database tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Post Title: 'Annual Marketing Strategy Report'. Expected Status: 'publish'. Required Content Strings to verify presence: 'Southeast Asia', 'Eastern Europe', 'South America', '$2.4 million', 'loyalty program', 'Boston, Chicago, and Denver', 'brand awareness', 'customer retention'. Forbidden Content Strings to verify absence: 'DRAFT NOTES', 'placeholder', 'TODO'.
